core_mechanism: extraction of integer coefficients (a degeneracy count) from a generating function via a contour integral, where the extracted value jumps discontinuously as poles of the integrand cross the integration contour when an external control parameter is varied, so that fixing the contour relative to the poles yields either a parameter-dependent or a parameter-invariant count
brief_reason: The abstract counts degeneracies as coefficients of a Siegel modular form through a contour whose pole structure creates a moduli-dependent ambiguity, with poles crossing the contour at walls of marginal stability driving the discontinuous (dis)appearance of bound-state contributions.
